*Low Severe Weather Risk Wednesday Afternoon and Evening*

There will be a Low risk for severe weather Wednesday afternoon and evening, mainly after 2 PM in Southwestern Ontario.

Thunderstorms are likely to develop and move into the area, however they will likely weaken as they move eastward.

data.body: He came to the truck window and tells us he was going to go have dinner with his wife and kids and would be back with beer in a couple hours. He turned to me and said, "don't leave until I get back, we need to talk." I immediately felt my stomach drop.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: I was not all that surprised he knew my family but it wasn't until his uncle told me their mother's maiden name that things clicked for me. His family and mine have for generations had a Hatfield and McCoy type relationship. We talked about our stupid relatives on both sides.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: "...but I'm not telling her about your family name!" Their uncle left. His brothers went to bed. Leaving the two of us alone. I asked him where he wanted to sleep. Of course he wanted to go home. So I drove him home. I asked him if he knew I loved him and would never intentionally cause him pain.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7
